name: ICT Governance Center of Excellence
tagline: Govern templates, AI providers, artifacts, and documents with full lifecycle traceability.

sections.name: Overview
sections.description: Define goals and expected outcomes of your CoE and get started.

phases.name: Overview
phases.description: CoE mission, goals, and expected outcomes

phases.name: Download
phases.description: Starter kit, documentation, and governance pack exports

sections.name: Admin
sections.description: Gain insights into your ICT Governance adoption across templates, AI, artifacts, and documents.

phases.name: Set up
phases.description: Sync ADPA inventory, register lifecycle centers, assign CoE administrators

phases.name: Use
phases.description: Adoption dashboards, inventory health, and center KPIs

phases.name: Deep dive
phases.description: Per-center lifecycle registries — templates, AI providers, artifacts, documents

sections.name: Govern
sections.description: Establish required audit and compliance processes with immutable trails and rollback.

phases.name: Set up
phases.description: Onboarding checklists, business justification, owner assignment, RPAS binding

phases.name: Use
phases.description: Lifecycle transitions, audit review, compliance posture

phases.name: Deep dive
phases.description: Immutable audit log, version history, rollback procedures

sections.name: Nurture
sections.description: Accelerate adoption by thriving with a community of governance practitioners and makers.

phases.name: Set up
phases.description: Training catalog, L&D modules, community channels

phases.name: Use
phases.description: Complete training, track certifications, share best practices

goals.title: Standardize governance delivery
goals.outcome: Every tenant uses approved templates, artifacts, and documentation with consistent seven-pillar coverage.

goals.title: Automate policy-to-code
goals.outcome: Governance requirements flow through LLM pipelines to IaC and Compliance-as-Code with traceability.

goals.title: Assure audit readiness
goals.outcome: Immutable audit trails, version rollback, and RPAS-certified baselines for every lifecycle item.

goals.title: Govern Azure, AWS, GCP and Power Platform as one scope
goals.outcome: Each Power App is a software artifact asset; cloud resources map to pillars with Bicep/Terraform/Policy per provider.

getStartedSteps.title: Sync ADPA inventory
getStartedSteps.action: Admin → Set up → Sync from ADPA

getStartedSteps.title: Initiate lifecycle items
getStartedSteps.action: Admin → Deep dive → select a center → Initiate

getStartedSteps.title: Complete Govern onboarding
getStartedSteps.action: Govern → Set up → owners, justification, checklist

getStartedSteps.title: Generate tenant governance pack
getStartedSteps.action: Documents center or npm run adpa:generate:governance-doc

getStartedSteps.title: Complete Nurture training
getStartedSteps.action: Nurture → Use → mark training modules complete
